---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you want to happen. Be specific about the user-facing behaviour. -->

## Slack surface

<!-- How will this appear in Slack? New command, updated message, modal, etc. -->

## n8n impact

<!-- Will this require a new workflow, changes to an existing one, or no n8n changes? -->

- [ ] New workflow needed
- [ ] Existing workflow update needed — which one?
- [ ] No n8n changes

## Database impact

<!-- Will this require schema changes (`db/schema.sql`)? -->

- [ ] New table(s)
- [ ] New column(s) on existing table
- [ ] No schema changes

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out? -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- How will we know this is done? List specific, testable outcomes. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]
